title: Rich Roasted Algerian Ricotta Tagine
description: A savory Algerian dish featuring ricotta, cooked in a tagine with a blend of spices, perfect for a brunch mood. This ayurvedic sattvic friendly dish is sure to satisfy your taste buds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the crumbled ricotta cheese, olive oil, chopped onion, minced garlic, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a clay or ceramic tagine or a large oven-safe dish with a tight-fitting lid.
Cover the tagine or dish with the lid and roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve warm.
Traditionally, tagine is cooked over a low flame, but roasting in the oven achieves similar results with less effort.
